title: Silly's Auto Totem
description: Allows you to automatically reequip a totem after popping one
body:
Auto equip Totem of Undying after one is used.

**Client-side mod** keeps you alive by automatically re-equipping a Totem or Shield, with configurable delays and optional chat alerts.

## ⚠️ Disclaimer
Some servers may consider this mod an **unfair advantage** or **cheating**.

Please ask the server admins before using this mod in multiplayer.

Use at your own risk.

## Features
- Automatically equip a new Totem of Undying after one is consumed
- Equip a Shield if no Totems are found 
- Optional delay before equipping a new item 
- Optional chat alerts when equipping or if nothing is found
- Toggle the mod on/off with keybind **[Default: J]**
- Client-side & works on any server

## Configuration

Powered by **MidnightLib**, Silly's Auto Totem includes an ingame config menu.
You can customize:

- Whether the mod is Disabled or Enabled **[Default: Enabled]**
- Whether to equip a Shield when no Totem is found **[Default: Enabled]**
- Delay (in seconds) before equipping **[Default: 1 second]**
- Whether to alert in chat if a Totem or Shield was equipped **[Default: Disabled]**
- Whether to alert in chat if Totem wasn't found **[Default: Disabled]**
- Whether to alert in chat if Shield wasn't found **[Default: Disabled]**
- Chat Alert Colour Customization **[Default: Red]**

## Requirements
| Requirements| Why?|
|---------------------|:---------------------:|
| [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)| Mod loader|
| [MidnightLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/midnightlib)| Handles the Mod Configuration|

| Optional| Why?|
|---------------------|:---------------------:|
|[Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)| Adds a "Mods" button to main menu and makes configuration easier|

## Compatibility

- Supports Minecraft versions **1.20 – 1.21.11**
- Fabric Mod Loader
- Works in both **Singleplayer** and **Multiplayer**

## Feedback

Have suggestions or found a bug?

Open an issue on [Github](https://github.com/sillygoober2/Auto-Totem) OR contact me on Discord (Discord ID: **gwabgwab**)
